scripts.preflight:code: npm run check:encoding && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.preflight:full: npm run check:local && npm run check:migrations && npm run check:plans && npm run check:logos && npm run check:prices && npm run preflight:code
